cenas.dalle_prompt: A dog is happily holding a favorite toy in its mouth. The trainer is showing excitement and praising the dog for simply holding the toy. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: Static shot, focusing on the positive association with holding an object.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The trainer gently takes the toy, says 'Sim!', and gives a treat. Then immediately gives the toy back. Teaching that giving the toy to the owner is a good thing. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A close-up on the gentle exchange, highlighting the positive reinforcement loop: give toy -> get treat -> get toy back.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The trainer tosses the toy a very short distance (1-2 feet). The dog goes to it, picks it up, and brings it back to the trainer for a reward. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The camera follows the short toss and the dog's successful retrieval, capturing the entire sequence.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The trainer now tosses the toy further away. The dog enthusiastically runs, retrieves the toy, and brings it back. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A dynamic tracking shot that follows the dog as it runs a longer distance, showing its speed and enthusiasm.

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final shot of a dog bringing the newspaper or a pair of slippers to its owner. A practical and helpful application of the fetch command. Text overlay: 'Buscar: O Ajudante Perfeito'. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A heartwarming shot of the dog being helpful. The text appears in a friendly, helpful font.
